steps.title: Use the requested detail
steps.content: The student's goal is to specify the year Marian Collett created Sister. The relevant notes say that Sister is a bronze sculpture and that Collett created it in 1973.

steps.title: Keep title and year together
steps.content: A gives Collett's birth year, not the sculpture's creation year. B describes her broader artistic reputation without naming Sister or 1973. C mentions sculptures generally but omits the title and year. The remaining choice states the creator, medium, title, and year. The answer is D.
